judgment.summary: Rapidly growing software company with strong revenue and earnings growth, but high valuation multiples and thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 18.3%; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 113.4% indicate strong business momentum.
Gross margin 79.9% is very healthy, suggesting efficient service delivery.
Total cash $4.76B vs total debt $1.29B provides a solid liquidity position.
Consensus is strong buy with a mean analyst target above the current price.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 566.38 and Forward P/E of 75.66 indicate a very high valuation.
Operating margin of 0.8% and profit margin of 3.7% are thin, suggesting profitability challenges despite revenue growth.
Return on equity of 3.9% and return on assets of -0.2% are weak.
Beta of 1.29 suggests higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Wedbush maintained a bullish stance on Datadog (DDOG), reiterating an Outperform rating with a $48 price target, according to recent headlines. While the specific target price seems misaligned with the current stock price, the analyst sentiment suggests continued confidence in the company's prospects. Traders should note the upcoming August earnings date as a potential catalyst.

headlines.title: Wedbush Remains Bullish On Dynatrace (DT) With $48 PT And Outperform Rating

examples.body: Net Option Delta Today +36k shares $DDOG ops
